subject: Re: Incident Report #5635
content:
Team,

I've been analyzing the response time data from last week and noticed some interesting trends:

- response time increased by 37% compared to the previous week
- The APAC region is underperforming by a factor of 2.5x
- We're seeing a correlation between response time and churn rate
- The Vanguard rollout appears to have had a positive impact

Dashboard link: https://grafana.internal/23cda08f8e

I think this warrants a deeper investigation. Steve, could you pull the raw data from Logging Service so we can cross-reference with User Directory?

Best,
Jack
--
Jack Lopez
DevOps Engineer | Aperturescience
+1-498-649-3482

subject: Re: Incident Report #5635
content:
Steve — 

Got it, makes sense. I'll loop in Frank from Marketing to get their perspective on the Search Index changes. In the meantime, I've created a shared doc where we can track the open items:

  https://docs.google.com/d/48aedb8880cab8c4

Current open items (5 total):
- Phoenix integration testing (owner: Steve)
- NetSecure Pro contract review (owner: Jack)
- Observability Stack documentation (owner: Frank)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before our Tuesday sync.

Thanks,
Jack

Best,
Jack Lopez
DevOps Engineer, Data Science
